name: Help!
instruction: Thumb on fist, raise up urgently

name: Danger
instruction: A-hand brushes up on back of hand

name: Police
instruction: C-hand taps badge area on chest

name: Doctor
instruction: Tap wrist pulse point with fingers

name: Hospital
instruction: H-hand draws cross on upper arm

name: Hurt
instruction: Both index fingers point to pain area

name: Allergy
instruction: Index hooks nose, then index touches
